use_cases: Hero section backgrounds for landing pages requiring atmospheric visual effects
Full-page animated backgrounds for marketing and product showcase sites
Landing page sections needing decorative animated overlays
Portfolio and presentation sites requiring visual depth
SaaS dashboards and marketing pages seeking modern gradient aesthetics
ai_summary: A mesmerizing animated background component featuring blurred radial gradients in sky-rose-lime colors against a dark zinc backdrop. Uses Framer Motion for entrance animations with floating blob effects. Ideal for hero sections, landing pages, and marketing sites requiring atmospheric visual depth. Provides a modern glass-morphism aesthetic with gradient color transitions suitable for SaaS and portfolio applications.
